query:
-- Link all 10 Action Smart Group numbers to the new service record
UPDATE phone_numbers
SET serviceExternalId = 'svc-asg-commsCode-voice',
    customerExternalId = 'cust-action-smart-group',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode'
  AND customerName = 'Action Smart Group'
  AND (serviceExternalId IS NULL OR serviceExternalId = '');

-- Link the 1 Envest number to the new service record
UPDATE phone_numbers
SET serviceExternalId = 'svc-envest-commsCode-voice',
    customerExternalId = 'cust-envest',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode'
  AND customerName = 'Envest'
  AND (serviceExternalId IS NULL OR serviceExternalId = '');
